\noindent In Section 5.4.4 we developed \ttblue{mod.2}, that incorporates two separate regression lines. In addition to the three independent variables, we also account for their interactions with the dummy variable \ttblue{summer}.
The scatterplot in Figure 5.6 is prepared using

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 5))
sns.scatterplot(data=USSteamCoEstim, x='production', y='revenue', color='#00338D', ax=ax)
ax.set_xlabel('production')
ax.set_ylabel('revenue')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
